tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic enable
set comments "Top-priority deny: block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to WAN"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
        set uuid be0d5f12-250f-51f1-6b47-18a7e38e1827
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic disable
        set comments "Top-priority deny: block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to WAN"
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_HTTP_Src_Ubuntu"
        set uuid c38a715a-250f-51f1-3084-b331f8d29c2b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_LAN_ICMP"
        set uuid c9377710-250f-51f1-2d69-f65a59c3a535
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "LAN_NET"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
